description: Colombian narcoparamilitary group that emerged as dissidents of the Autodefensas Gaitanistas de Colombia/Clan del Golfo. Based in the Bajo Cauca region of Antioquia, they engaged in massacres, murders, extortion, forced displacement, drug trafficking, and illegal mining. The group was dismantled in 2021 after the death of its leader Robinson Gil Tapias.

country_links.evidence_quote: Tienen alianzas con el Cartel Jalisco Nueva Generación de México .
country_links.context: Los Caparrapos have an alliance with the Cartel Jalisco Nueva Generación of Mexico.
